stemHtml: In accordance with OPS regulations, the operator shall ensure that…

options.a: for the conduct of VFR flights in class B airspace, horizontal distance from clouds is at least 1500 m.
options.b: for the conduct of VFR flights in class F airspace, vertical distance from clouds is at least 250 m .
options.c: for the conduct of VFR flights in class E airspace, flight visibility at and above 3050 m (10 000 ft) is at least 5 km and clear of cloud.
options.d: for the conduct of VFR flights in class C airspace, horizontal distance from clouds is at least 1000 m.
